parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chatId: ($env.ADMIN_ALERT_PHONE || '+260761359005').replace('+','') + '@c.us', text: 'Bwana escalation from user ' + $json.user_id + ': ' + $json.message, session: 'default' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL || 'google/gemini-2.0-flash-001', max_tokens: 400, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are Bwana, ZedApply\'s AI career assistant for Zambian professionals. Matching: 60% semantic + 30% skills + 10% bonus. Tiers: Free 10/mo, Starter K125 50/mo, Professional K250 125/mo, Super Standard K500 unlimited. Lenco MTN/Airtel, digest 07:00. Under 150 words.' }, ...($json.history || []).map(h => ({ role: h.role, content: h.content })), { role: 'user', content: $json.message }] }) }}

meta.description: Clone of Portfolio Vergeo chat pattern: FAQ fast path, WAHA escalation to Kaluba, OpenRouter LLM fallback. Webhook body: { user_id, message, session_id, history? }.
